message:
🌱 jaeger: Allow configuration of jaeger client in the query service (#1849)

* 🌱 Add jaeger: Allow configuration of jaeger client in the query service mission

* 🌱 Add jaeger: Allow configuration of jaeger client in the query service mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "jaeger-1044-allow-configuration-of-jaeger-client-in-the-query-service",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "jaeger: Allow configuration of jaeger client in the query service",
+    "description": "Allow configuration of jaeger client in the query service. Requested by 8+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current jaeger deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your jaeger version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n jaeger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nhelm list -n jaeger 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working jaeger installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review jaeger configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant jaeger configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n jaeger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl get configmap -n jaeger -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=jaeger\n```\n## Requirement - what kind of business use case are you trying to solve?\nThe jaeger query service allows for tracing the query service itself."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Allow configuration of jaeger client in the query service",
+        "description": "After this is done we should add configuration to docker compose file pointing tracer to jaeger agent.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n jaeger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl get events -n jaeger --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Allow configuration of jaeger client in the query service\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "After this is done we should add configuration to docker compose file pointing tracer to jaeger agent.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "jaeger",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "jaeger"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger/issues/1044",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger"
+    },
+    "reactions": 8,
+    "comments": 18,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with jaeger installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:39:02.226Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}

+    "type": "feature",

+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current jaeger deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your jaeger version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n jaeger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nhelm list -n jaeger 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working jaeger installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review jaeger configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant jaeger configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n jaeger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl get configmap -n jaeger -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=jaeger\n```\n## Requirement - what kind of business use case are you trying to solve?\nThe jaeger query service allows for tracing the query service itself."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Allow configuration of jaeger client in the query service",
+        "description": "## Which problem is this PR solving?\nThe query service shall now be configured using the environmental variables to configure the tracer.\n\nSee the fix PR for details: linked PR"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n jaeger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl get events -n jaeger --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Allow configuration of jaeger client in the query service\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],

+      "summary": "## Which problem is this PR solving?\nThe query service shall now be configured using the environmental variables to configure the tracer.",
